wiki.summary: "God Is a DJ" is a trip-hop and dance song by Faithless, released as a single on 24 August 1998. The single reached number six in the United Kingdom and also reached number one on the Billboard Hot Dance Club Play chart for one week in September 1998. The song was written by Maxi Jazz, Rollo, Sister Bliss and Jamie Catto and featured on the band's second album, Sunday 8PM. Read more on Last.fm.
